summary: Parent done reconciliation allowed completion after finding a valid public_safety_result produced by a real Hermes public-safety-gate worker and sanitized into the public worker-result contract.
scope: real Hermes worker result plus Overkill Factory transition_hook parent done reconciliation
limits: This proof satisfies only real_worker_done_reconciliation for the production update preflight.
It does not prove specialist quality across all workers, production rollback/monitoring, Operator Control Tower readiness, Discord readiness or the final Hermes update receipt.
Raw runtime output, local paths, runtime ids, session files and provider logs are intentionally not stored in the public repository.
